description_long: This is a female adult pedestrian with a medium build, wearing a sleeveless top and fitted pants. Her hair is voluminous and shoulder-length, styled in loose waves. She stands with her arms extended horizontally, revealing a relaxed but upright posture. The top is loose-fitting, while the pants are more form-fitting, and she wears casual athletic shoes. Her facial features are softly modeled, and her overall appearance suggests she is dressed for comfort, possibly for walking or light activity in an urban environment. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A medium-build adult woman in casual attire with voluminous shoulder-length hair, standing with arms outstretched. She wears a sleeveless top, fitted pants, and athletic shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, sleeveless top, fitted pants, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the loose fit of the top, and the form of the pants and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hair, the top, and the pants, with both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, similar to the left, with clear visibility of the hair volume and body posture.
attribute_clothing_type: casual sleeveless top and fitted pants, athletic style
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
